sentences.text: Hello?
Hi!
Hi, how are you?
God, give me one sec, let me close the door.
Hi.
Tim!
Good.
I keep getting sinus infections, … So, I sound adjusted today.
Like, allergies, or what's… what's starting.
reality.

It's, like… Since I moved back to Orlando, well, specifically, actually, when I moved further north, like, our house is surrounded by trees, and I think, it's been a while since I've done an allergy test, I need to call an allergist, and I think I'm just allergic to all the vegetation by me, which is ideal, like, we bought a house.
Yeah That sucks.
What kind of allergies are even, like, do you have in Orlando at this time?

So, I think it's, like, since it's always warm here, I mean, it fluctuates up and down a little, just everything's always blooming, and there are a lot of, like, rent… like, I have a window right here, so we have, like, a big tree, we have a palm tree.
We have another big tree right there, so it's just there's so much pollen.
Yeah.
And we have a dog, and I know I'm, like, allergic to some pet dander, so it's just, I think….
Yeah.
not….
A whole mix of things, it sounds like.
We had a Black Lab Chesapeake Bay Retriever mix before the Golden Doodle we have now, and I was definitely pretty allergic to her, but I'm like, you know, it's worth it.
I love her, so… I dealt with that for 13 years, and then I was like, I have to get a semi-hypoallergenic dog, so….
Thank you.
We went with the Golden Doodle, and I still am, like, a little allergic to her, but it's fine.
It's fine.
Yeah.
What else is new?
What's going on?
Nothing!
I'm trying to… we are hopefully onboarding to new people here soon, so the team is growing.
That's great.
Exciting.
Yeah, I keep refreshing my… we use Workday, because one has signed her offer letter, but the other one hasn't.
So, on the edge of my seat with that.
Yeah.
Trigger will be going on… leave.
Yeah, here shortly, so….
So exciting.
Yeah, lots of stuff.
We have our marketing retreat next month, so a lot of things happening in the.
Yeah.
Jeez.
Yeah.
Well, hopefully she signs, hopefully nothing happens there.
Where is the marketing retreat?
It's in Nashville.
Nice!
That'll be fun.
That should be fun.
It should be a good time.
We, like, fly in, like, a Tuesday afternoon, and then we all fly home Wednesday.
I mean, Thursday afternoon, so we're there for, like, two full days, which should be good.
That's nice.
That's a good amount of time, though.
We just did our full company off-site in Chicago two weeks ago, and it was, yeah, two full days.
Like, you get in, you have one night, and then a day, and then mostly the next day, too.
So, it's always nice getting together in person.
It is.
Go.
Yeah, well, thanks for hopping on.
I know that I've been kind of pestering you for a little while here, so….
Today finally made sense.
I don't feel, like, overwhelmed with anything.
It's just… it's just you.
Yeah.
Well, I know that we started the conversation, and then it sounded like around the time of AIM, there was interest to do a pilot.
I know we did, like, the full team demo a couple months back now, and then obviously got your message that it sounds like you guys are moving forward with Zumper, at least for a pilot?
Or what… what does that look like right now?
Yeah.
So, the Google Business Profile, they're moving forward with Zumper.
Okay.
It's not a full-blown, like, MSA, it's not like we're launching it on all of the communities, it's just kind of like a, hey, let's launch it on these, like, 15 or 20.
And track progress on those to see if this is….
something in their eyes that, like, is worth us opening the floodgates.
So I think after we have, like, a good 3-6 months worth of data, we can revisit if we throw in, like, a second vendor in the mix.
It wasn't, like, a big launch.
Like, there… we just have so many forced technology fees on the team that, like, we were asked to, like.
Is this really what you want to die on, and we really want this reporting tool?
And we're like, no, we're willing to meet you halfway.
I'm like, here's one.
Were there some, like, key differentiators in choosing to pilot Zumper over us?
It came down to their offering.
They added in the ILS, which we didn't need, because you guys would have probably done the same thing.
But they, like, included some reels.
Okay.
To, like, add in there, so that was really the only, like, one-up differentiator.
The price was pretty close on both, so it wasn't, like… Anything glaring there that, like, having that added reel feature was good.
Okay.
Was adding in the Reels feature enough to get away from us for the Google tool altogether, or are you guys still open to doing, like, a side-by-side comparison for the Google tool?
with us.
At this time, we are not going to, like, let another tool into, like, our Google Business profiles.
It's just testing it out with them.
Okay.

But I think we can revisit in 2026, once we have… because, like, we just started a handful of communities in August, so I think, like, by January, February, we'll have… I know it's not the best season, but, like, a, hey, how much of a lift does this really give us in comparing communities that have nothing to some communities that have something?
Yeah, okay.
Well, I will be very transparent that we've had a lot of customers switch to us this year.
For.
the Google tool, specifically for the Google tool.
So, we've gotten Asset, RPM, Willowbridge, a couple of the bigger ones that have switched to us.
From other posting tools for Google.
And the feedback that they have given is they are tools built in-house, which gives us a lot of flexibility to customize at a property level.
get your brand voice sounding like your property.

We have some features that they don't have, but they've told us that it's specifically that it's our product, and Zumper's white-labeling a product, that is the reason that they switched over, and post quality is the other one that came up often.
So, I didn't want to get on this call and just….
Oh, you're fine.
reasons, like, that they have said that, but I did want to at least let you know that.

So that's the only thing that I was thinking, if we could do a side-by-side comparison, or we could get a couple properties live on it that you could compare during the same time, but… If that's not an opportunity, then maybe we could just connect later this year, or early next, see how it's going at that time.
Perfect.
Yeah, let's reconnect later this year, early next year.
Just, like, at least we've gotten them on board with a Google posting tool, and then we can see what kinks we find along the way that you guys can maybe do better.
Okay.
Well, that sounds good.
Let's definitely keep in touch, though.
Let me know how it's going, if you guys want to revisit the conversation.
We're open to doing, like, free trials as well, so if you wanted to get a couple properties up and running for free, we're happy to do that as well, so….
Okay, cool.
Thanks.
Well, yeah, of course!
Well, appreciate you chatting with me through this.
A bummer that….

It sounds like it's not going to be working out right now, but I was glad we were able to talk about it, so… We're still leaving the door, or… a smidge open, so we can definitely figure out… and who knows, maybe they fumble the ball a lot along the way, and it's just like, hey, you guys already said yes to this, let's try someone else sort of thing, so… All right.
Keep me posted.
Obviously, I don't hope it goes poorly, but I would love to partner with you and the Rangewater team at some point.
I love hanging out with you guys, so….
I know, you're the best, I appreciate you.
Yes.
Alright, well, have a good rest of your day.
You too, bye!
trust you.
